page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.32xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of threads to physical cores, hyperthreading is disabled, ensuring dedicated execution resources for each virtual CPU.

The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given the high core count, dedicated CPU allocation, and 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for compute-intensive workloads. It is suitable for high-performance computing, batch processing, intensive compilation tasks, and network-heavy applications that require predictable CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture. Powered by Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at 3.3 GHz, it operates without hyperthreading to deliver predictable, dedicated CPU performance. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It contains no local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This configuration is optimized for compute-heavy workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, and large-scale compilation tasks.
